name: Pixal3D
description: Local Pixal3D image-to-3D backend and Gradio UI packaged as an installable Nymph module.

overview.body:
Pixal3D generates textured 3D assets from a single image using a TRELLIS.2-style backbone and Pixal3D projection pipeline.

Install sets up the local source tree and runtime shell. Fetch Models downloads model assets into shared NymphsData caches. Start launches the addon API server for Blender. Open Gradio launches the official Pixal3D Gradio app and opens it inside the NymphsCore module details WebView.

License and access notice:
- Pixal3D is for academic use only under its local LICENSE. It is not licensed for commercial or production use.
- Pixal3D's local LICENSE says it is not intended for use within the European Union.
- The official Pixal3D pipeline uses briaai/RMBG-2.0 for background removal. That model is gated on Hugging Face and released for non-commercial use.
- Before Fetch Models, open the BRIA RMBG-2.0 access form with the same Hugging Face account as your token, complete BRIA's form, and agree to BRIA's terms: https://huggingface.co/briaai/RMBG-2.0
- The user is responsible for confirming their intended use is allowed by Pixal3D, BRIA RMBG, Hugging Face, and dependency licenses.

options.label: CUDA 13
options.description: Use the NymphsCore CUDA 13 runtime profile

options.label: Manual
options.description: Create folders and marker only; install heavy deps manually

manager_action_groups.title: Model Fetch
manager_action_groups.description: Fetch Pixal3D checkpoints and auxiliary camera/background/projection models into shared NymphsData caches. The standard profiles keep the current safetensors runtime. The GGUF profiles fetch community quantized weights for adapter testing only; the runtime is not switched until the GGUF loader bridge is implemented. The BRIA RMBG-2.0 access form must be accepted on Hugging Face before gated background-removal weights can be downloaded.

options.label: Low VRAM 1024
options.description: Recommended first test; lower peak VRAM and 1024 cascade

options.label: Standard 1536
options.description: Heavier profile for high VRAM systems

options.label: GGUF Q5_K_M (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q5 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

options.label: GGUF Q6_K (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q6 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

options.label: GGUF Q8_0 (experimental)
options.description: Fetch community Pixal3D GGUF Q8 weights for adapter testing; current runtime remains safetensors

notes: The official upstream training code and data toolkit are preserved in the module repo, but v0.1 exposes inference and Gradio testing only.
Do not vendor model weights into this repo.
